news_items.title: Belgium XI vs Senegal: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup, injury latest for World Cup 2026 | The Standard
news_items.author: George Flood
news_items.text:
Belgium XI vs Senegal: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup, injury latest for World Cup 2026 | The Standard

Sport| Football

# Belgium XI vs Senegal: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup, injury latest for World Cup 2026

Red Devils get defensive boost before last-32 showdown in Seattle

Star man: Kevin De Bruyne will hope to inspire Belgium into the last 16 of the World Cup

Getty

George Flood, Senior Sport Editor@GeorgeFlood24

1 minute ago

COMMENTS

Zeno Debast has returned to training as Belgium prepare to face Senegal in the World Cup round of 32.

The Sporting defender has yet to play at this tournament due to a leg injury suffered on club duty in Portugal in early May.

Debast was always expected to miss the group stage having still been included in the 26-man squad, though returned to training on Sunday after reporting “positive” results from a follow-up MRI scan.

The 22-year-old seems unlikely to start as Group G winners Belgium meet Senegal - who edged through from Group I as the eighth-best third-place team- in a knockout tie in Seattle on Wednesday, but his comeback will nevertheless be a boost for head coach Rudi Garcia as he looks to mastermind a deep run into

George Flood, Senior Sport Editor@GeorgeFlood24

1 minute ago

COMMENTS

Zeno Debast has returned to training as Belgium prepare to face Senegal in the World Cup round of 32.

The Sporting defender has yet to play at this tournament due to a leg injury suffered on club duty in Portugal in early May.

Debast was always expected to miss the group stage having still been included in the 26-man squad, though returned to training on Sunday after reporting “positive” results from a follow-up MRI scan.

The 22-year-old seems unlikely to start as Group G winners Belgium meet Senegal - who edged through from Group I as the eighth-best third-place team- in a knockout tie in Seattle on Wednesday, but his comeback will nevertheless be a boost for head coach Rudi Garcia as he looks to mastermind a deep run into

news_items.title: Belgium v Senegal | World Cup | Match preview
news_items.text:
Belgium v Senegal | World Cup | Match preview

Back

# Belgium v Senegal: Live stream, team news, tickets and more

Published29 Jun 2026

Share

Both sides will be looking to keep up the momentum after rounding out the group stage with statement wins.

## Belgium v SenegalBelgium v Senegal

https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289287/400021525 https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289287/400021525

## Round of 32Round of 32

Wednesday, 1 July | Seattle Stadium

## Kick-off timeKick-off time

13:00 (Seattle) | 22:00 (Brussels) | 20:30 (Dakar)

---

### The matchThe match

The festival of football in Seattle continues with an intriguing FIFA World Cup 2026™ Round of 32 tie between Belgium and Senegal, two teams who finally burst into life after making slow starts to the tournament. Having been held to disappointing draws in their first two games by Egypt and Iran respectively, Belgium produced a five-star display against New Zealand with the help of a star turn from Leandro Trossard.

The goal blitz meant the Red Devils finished top of Group G and booked their place in the knockout stages, having failed to do so at the last World Cup in Qatar.

Senegal,

Having been held to disappointing draws in their first two games by Egypt and Iran respectively, Belgium produced a five-star display against New Zealand with the help of a star turn from Leandro Trossard.

The goal blitz meant the Red Devils finished top of Group G and booked their place in the knockout stages, having failed to do so at the last World Cup in Qatar.

Story by

Belgium vs Senegal– Match preview and team news

Unbeaten in their last 16 games, Belgium is now set to take on Africa Cup of Nations finalists Senegal in their Round of 32 match on Wednesday at the Seattle Stadium.

## Belgium vs Senegal – Match preview and team news

Date: Wednesday, 1st July.

Kick-off: 9pm BST.

Venue: Seattle Stadium, Washington, USA.

Advertisement

Advertisement

## Belgium team news

Belgium enters their World Cup Round of 32 clash with an almost entirely healthy roster, giving manager Rudi Garcia massive tactical flexibility.

Jérémy Doku returned to play the last group game against New Zealand after a brief trip home to attend the birth of his child and is fully available.

Furthermore, defender Nathan Ngoy returns from a one-match suspension served during the 5-1 thrashing of New Zealand, reinforcing the backline.

The only minor fitness cloud hangs over defender Zeno Debast, who r

# Belgium XI vs Senegal: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup, injury latest for World Cup 2026

Red Devils get defensive boost before last-32 showdown in Seattle

Star man: Kevin De Bruyne will hope to inspire Belgium into the last 16 of the World Cup

Getty

George Flood, Senior Sport Editor@GeorgeFlood24

1 minute ago

COMMENTS

Zeno Debast has returned to training as Belgium prepare to face Senegal in the World Cup round of 32.

The Sporting defender has yet to play at this tournament due to a leg injury suffered on club duty in Portugal in early May.

Debast was always expected to miss the group stage having still been included in the 26-man squad, though returned to training on Sunday after reporting “positive” results from a follow-up MRI scan.

The 22-year-old seems unlikely to start as Group G winners Belgium meet Senegal - who edged through from Group I as the eighth-best third-place team- in a knockout tie in Seattle on Wednesday, but his comeback will nevertheless be a boost for head coach Rudi Garcia as he looks to mastermind a deep run into "}

Published29 Jun 2026

Share

## Belgium v SenegalBelgium v Senegal

https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289287/400021525 https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289287/400021525

## Round of 32Round of 32

Wednesday, 1 July | Seattle Stadium

## Kick-off timeKick-off time

13:00 (Seattle) | 22:00 (Brussels) | 20:30 (Dakar)

---

### The matchThe match

The festival of football in Seattle continues with an intriguing FIFA World Cup 2026™ Round of 32 tie between Belgium and Senegal, two teams who finally burst into life after making slow starts to the tournament. Having been held to disappointing draws in their first two games by Egypt and Iran respectively, Belgium produced a five-star display against New Zealand with the help of a star turn from Leandro Trossard.

The goal blitz meant the Red Devils finished top of Group G and booked their place in the knockout stages, having failed to do so at the last World Cup in Qatar.

Belgium vs Senegal– Match preview and team news

Unbeaten in their last 16 games, Belgium is now set to take on Africa Cup of Nations finalists Senegal in their Round of 32 match on Wednesday at the Seattle Stadium.

## Belgium vs Senegal – Match preview and team news

Date: Wednesday, 1st July.

Kick-off: 9pm BST.

Venue: Seattle Stadium, Washington, USA.

Advertisement

Advertisement

## Belgium team news

Belgium enters their World Cup Round of 32 clash with an almost entirely healthy roster, giving manager Rudi Garcia massive tactical flexibility.

Jérémy Doku returned to play the last group game against New Zealand after a brief trip home to attend the birth of his child and is fully available.

Furthermore, defender Nathan Ngoy returns from a one-match suspension served during the 5-1 thrashing of New Zealand, reinforcing the backline.

The only minor fitness cloud hangs over defender Zeno Debast, who r"}
